pg122-p2-s1: Our women folk have suggested certain attitudes a wife may take with the husband who is recovering.
pg122-p2-s2:
Perhaps they created
the impression that he is to be wrapped in cotton wool and placed on a pedestal.
pg122-p2-s4: All members of the family should meet upon the common ground of tolerance, understanding and love.
pg122-p2-s5:
This
involves a process of deflation.
pg122-p2-s6:
The alcoholic, his wife, his children, his "in-laws," each one is likely to have fixed
ideas about the family's attitude towards himself or herself.
pg122-p2-s7: Each is interested in having his or her wishes respected.
pg122-p2-s8: We find the more one member of the family demands that the others concede to him, the more resentful they become.

This
makes for discord and unhappiness.
pg122-p2:
Our women folk have suggested certain attitudes a wife may take with the husband who is recovering. Perhaps they created
the impression that he is to be wrapped in cotton wool and placed on a pedestal. Successful readjustment means the
opposite. All members of the family should meet upon the common ground of tolerance, understanding and love. This
involves a process of deflation. The alcoholic, his wife, his children, his "in-laws," each one is likely to have fixed
ideas about the family's attitude towards himself or herself. Each is interested in having his or her wishes respected. We find the more one member of the family demands that the others concede to him, the more resentful they become. This
makes for discord and unhappiness.
pg122-p3-s2: Is it not because each wants to play the lead?
pg122-p3-s3: Is not each trying to arrange the family show to his liking?
pg122-p3-s4:
Is
he not unconsciously trying to see what he can take from the family life rather than give?
pg122-p3:
And why? Is it not because each wants to play the lead? Is not each trying to arrange the family show to his liking? Is
he not unconsciously trying to see what he can take from the family life rather than give?
pg122-p4-s1: Cessation of drinking is but the first step away from a highly strained, abnormal condition.
pg122-p4-s3:
Years
of living with an alcoholic is almost sure to make any wife or child neurotic.
pg122-p4-s4:
The entire family is, to some extent,
ill."
pg122-p4-s5: Let families realize, as they start their journey, that all will not be fair weather.
pg122-p4-s6:
Each in his turn may be
footsore and may straggle.
pg122-p4:
Cessation of drinking is but the first step away from a highly strained, abnormal condition. A doctor said to us," Years
of living with an alcoholic is almost sure to make any wife or child neurotic. The entire family is, to some extent,
ill." Let families realize, as they start their journey, that all will not be fair weather. Each in his turn may be
footsore and may straggle.
